review:
Either my tastes have changed or Smiley's has improved.  Maybe a bit of both? Regardless, Smiley's went from an option to one of my regulars over the last several months.

Getting a beef gyro is simple but delivers a wonderfully tasty lunch or dinner.  I'm hooked on their tabouli salad.  I recently tried their falafel platter.  While it doesn't replace the recently closed Mama's falafel my heart and belly miss, it does well on its own right.

I've also enjoyed a few of their real fruit smoothies.  I really love the one with honey and coconut milk, however, the name is escaping me at the moment.  Go large FTW.

They have very limited seating even prior to COVID restrictions.  I think they only have one or two tables outside, so it is more of a to-go joint.  They staff has always been friendly. Really, I can only end by saying check them out!
